title: Aster baylahuen
intro: The Aster baylahuen, also known as Chile aster or Chilean mountain aster, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing relief from various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Aster baylahuen include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Aster baylahuen is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and digestive issues.
